sourcesContent:
import { useState, useEffect, useRef } from "react";

const PHOTO_B64 = "data:image/jpeg;base64,";

/* ─── DATA ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
const DATA = {
  name: "Amit Panda",
  title: "Embedded Systems Developer",
  subtitle: "Motorsports & Automotive",
  phone: "(+91) 8208164481",
  email: "amitpanda.18114@gmail.com",
  linkedin: "linkedin.com/in/Amit-Panda",
  objective:
    "Electronics & Computer Science Engineering student with a strong foundation in embedded systems, IoT, and software development, driven by a problem-solving mindset and a passion for building reliable, efficient solutions across hardware and software.",

  education: [
    {
      degree: "B.Tech – Electronics & Computer Science Engineering",
      institution: "St John College of Engineering and Management",
      score: "CGPA: 7.11 / 10.00",
      year: "2022 – 2026",
    },
    {
      degree: "Higher Secondary (Science)",
      institution: "Sanskriti Junior College",
      score: "62.61%",
      year: "2020 – 2022",
    },
    {
      degree: "High School (Xth)",
      institution: "Shanti Ratan Vidya Mandir",
      score: "81.80%",
      year: "2008 – 2020",
    },
  ],

  projects: [
    {
      name: "MedDrip",
      tag: "IoT-Based Smart IV Infusion Monitoring System",
      period: "Jun 2025 – Feb 2026",
      color: "#00e5ff",
      icon: "💧",
      bullets: [
        "Built a real-time IV infusion monitoring device to prevent backflow and over-infusion.",
        "Integrated sensors and microcontrollers to track fluid level and drip rate continuously.",
        "Enabled Wi-Fi-based mobile alerts to notify medical staff when IV level drops below threshold.",
        "Designed a compact hardware prototype for hospital and remote patient monitoring.",
      ],
    },
    {
      name: "MedVault",
      tag: "AI-IoT Medicine Box for Elderly Care",
      period: "Jun 2025 – Feb 2026",
      color: "#76ff03",
      icon: "💊",
      bullets: [
        "Developed an affordable AI-powered medicine box for India's middle-class elderly.",
        "Integrated IoT sensors with a vernacular voice reminder system for timely medication alerts.",
        "Implemented automatic refill notifications and emergency health monitoring via cloud.",
        "Designed a compact 6-compartment structure for daily dosage management.",
      ],
    },
    {
      name: "Hawkeye",
      tag: "Drone & Unmanned Vehicle Detection System",
      period: "Jun 2024 – Feb 2024",
      color: "#ff6d00",
      icon: "🎯",
      bullets: [
        "Used YOLOv5 to identify drones in video streams captured via OpenCV in real-time.",
        "Python scripts manage YOLOv5 inference and handle frame processing via APIs.",
        "React and Streamlit display a real-time dashboard with live video feeds.",
      ],
    },
    {
      name: "ParkEase",
      tag: "Your Parking Solution",
      period: "Jun 2023 – Feb 2023",
      color: "#e040fb",
      icon: "🅿️",
      bullets: [
        "Developed a sophisticated car parking system with a Mobile application.",
        "Users can see availability of parking slots and book in real-time.",
        "Designed responsive interfaces for seamless UX across devices.",
      ],
    },
  ],

  skills: [
    { cat: "Languages", items: ["Python", "C", "Embedded C", "JavaScript", "Dart"] },
    { cat: "Web & App", items: ["Flutter", "React", "HTML5", "CSS"] },
    { cat: "AI & Vision", items: ["OpenCV", "YOLOv5"] },
    { cat: "Frameworks", items: ["Streamlit", "Arduino IDE"] },
    { cat: "Backend & DB", items: ["Firebase", "MySQL", "Blynk IoT", "ThingSpeak"] },
    { cat: "Hardware", items: ["ESP32", "Arduino", "Raspberry Pi", "IoT"] },
    { cat: "DevOps", items: ["Git", "GitHub", "LaTeX"] },
    { cat: "Soft Skills", items: ["Problem-solving", "Teamwork", "Time Management"] },
  ],

  experience: [
    {
      role: "Team Lead",
      org: "Team Turbospace Racing",
      location: "Palghar, IND",
      period: "Nov 2025 – Feb 2026",
      bullets: [
        "Restructured team roles based on individual strengths to improve overall efficiency.",
        "Reviewed official rulebook and led kart modifications to meet competition standards.",
        "Optimized build costs by identifying unnecessary expenditures without compromising performance.",
        "Oversaw vehicle electrical systems integration during pre-race testing and competition.",
        "Led failure analysis and corrective actions based on track performance.",
      ],
    },
    {
      role: "Steering System Head",
      org: "Team Turbospace Racing",
      location: "Palghar, IND",
      period: "Jul 2025 – Nov 2025",
      bullets: [
        "Assembled and aligned steering rack, column, and linkages ensuring smooth operation.",
        "Performed inspection and adjustments based on driver feedback and track conditions.",
      ],
    },
  ],

  achievements: [
    { rank: "AIR 4", event: "FKDC 2025", desc: "Electric Go-Kart Design & Development", icon: "🏆" },
    { rank: "AIR 9", event: "GKDC 2026", desc: "Electric Go-Kart Design & Development", icon: "🥇" },
    { rank: "1st Prize", event: "SynTech-X 2024", desc: "Project Pitching – ParkEase, R.D. National College", icon: "🎖️" },
    { rank: "1st Prize", event: "BIS 2024", desc: "BIS Standard Presentation Competition", icon: "🏅" },
    { rank: "Selected", event: "Avishkar 2024–25", desc: "University of Mumbai – First Round", icon: "⭐" },
  ],

  coursework: [
    "Embedded Systems", "Electronics Systems", "Web Development",
    "Motorsports / Automotive", "Machine Learning", "Mobile App Development",
  ],
};

/* ─── HOOKS ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
function useInView(threshold = 0.15) {
  const ref = useRef(null);
  const [inView, setInView] = useState(false);
  useEffect(() => {
    const obs = new IntersectionObserver(([e]) => { if (e.isIntersecting) { setInView(true); obs.disconnect(); } }, { threshold });
    if (ref.current) obs.observe(ref.current);
    return () => obs.disconnect();
  }, [threshold]);
  return [ref, inView];
}

/* ─── SHARED COMPONENTS ─────────────────────────────────────────────── */
function SectionLabel({ num, label }) {
  return (
    <div style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 16, marginBottom: 48 }}>
      <span style={{ fontFamily: "'DM Mono', monospace", fontSize: 11, color: "#ff4500", letterSpacing: "0.15em" }}>
        {num}
      </span>
      <div style={{ flex: 1, height: 1, background: "rgba(255,69,0,0.25)" }} />
      <span style={{ fontFamily: "'DM Mono', monospace", fontSize: 11, color: "#888", letterSpacing: "0.18em", textTransform: "uppercase" }}>
        {label}
      </span>
    </div>
  );
}

function Reveal({ children, delay = 0, direction = "up" }) {
  const [ref, inView] = useInView();
  const transforms = { up: "translateY(40px)", left: "translateX(-30px)", right: "translateX(30px)", fade: "scale(0.95)" };
  return (
    <div
      ref={ref}
      style={{
        opacity: inView ? 1 : 0,
        transform: inView ? "none" : (transforms[direction] || transforms.up),
        transition: `opacity 0.8s ${delay}s cubic-bezier(0.23,1,0.32,1), transform 0.8s ${delay}s cubic-bezier(0.23,1,0.32,1)`,
      }}
    >
      {children}
    </div>
  );
}

/* ─── NAV ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
function Nav({ active }) {
  const [scrolled, setScrolled] = useState(false);
  useEffect(() => {
    const fn = () => setScrolled(window.scrollY > 60);
    window.addEventListener("scroll", fn);
    return () => window.removeEventListener("scroll", fn);
  }, []);

  const links = ["About", "Projects", "Skills", "Experience", "Achievements"];
  return (
    <nav style={{
      position: "fixed", top: 0, left: 0, right: 0, zIndex: 100,
      padding: "20px 48px",
      display: "flex", alignItems: "center", justifyContent: "space-between",
      background: scrolled ? "rgba(5,5,5,0.92)" : "transparent",
      backdropFilter: scrolled ? "blur(20px)" : "none",
      borderBottom: scrolled ? "1px solid rgba(255,69,0,0.15)" : "none",
      transition: "all 0.4s ease",
    }}>
      <div style={{ fontFamily: "'Bebas Neue', sans-serif", fontSize: 22, letterSpacing: "0.1em", color: "#fff" }}>
        AP<span style={{ color: "#ff4500" }}>.</span>
      </div>
      <div style={{ display: "flex", gap: 36 }}>
        {links.map(l => (
          <a key={l} href={`#${l.toLowerCase()}`} style={{
            fontFamily: "'DM Mono', monospace", fontSize: 11,
            letterSpacing: "0.12em", textTransform: "uppercase",
            color: active === l.toLowerCase() ? "#ff4500" : "#666",
            textDecoration: "none",
            transition: "color 0.3s",
          }}
            onMouseEnter={e => e.target.style.color = "#fff"}
            onMouseLeave={e => e.target.style.color = active === l.toLowerCase() ? "#ff4500" : "#666"}
          >
            {l}
          </a>
        ))}
      </div>
      <a href={`mailto:${DATA.email}`} style={{
        fontFamily: "'DM Mono', monospace", fontSize: 11,
        letterSpacing: "0.1em", padding: "8px 20px",
        border: "1px solid #ff4500", color: "#ff4500",
        textDecoration: "none",
        transition: "all 0.3s",
      }}
        onMouseEnter={e => { e.target.style.background = "#ff4500"; e.target.style.color = "#000"; }}
        onMouseLeave={e => { e.target.style.background = "transparent"; e.target.style.color = "#ff4500"; }}
      >
        Hire Me
      </a>
    </nav>
  );
}

/* ─── HERO ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
function Hero() {
  const [tick, setTick] = useState(0);
  useEffect(() => { const i = setInterval(() => setTick(t => t + 1), 50); return () => clearInterval(i); }, []);

  const rpm = Math.floor(3200 + Math.sin(tick * 0.12) * 400);
  const speed = Math.floor(87 + Math.sin(tick * 0.08) * 6);
  const temp = Math.floor(72 + Math.sin(tick * 0.05) * 3);

  return (
    <section id="about" style={{ minHeight: "100vh", display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", justifyContent: "center", position: "relative", overflow: "hidden", padding: "0 48px" }}>
      {/* Grid lines bg */}
      <div style={{ position: "absolute", inset: 0, backgroundImage: "linear-gradient(rgba(255,69,0,0.04) 1px, transparent 1px), linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(255,69,0,0.04) 1px, transparent 1px)", backgroundSize: "60px 60px", pointerEvents: "none" }} />

      {/* Big BG text */}
      <div style={{ position: "absolute", top: "50%", left: "50%", transform: "translate(-50%,-50%)", fontFamily: "'Bebas Neue', sans-serif", fontSize: "clamp(120px,18vw,280px)", color: "transparent", WebkitTextStroke: "1px rgba(255,69,0,0.08)", letterSpacing: "0.05em", whiteSpace: "nowrap", pointerEvents: "none", userSelect: "none" }}>
        ENGINEER
      </div>

      {/* Dashboard HUD — top right */}
      <div style={{ position: "absolute", top: 120, right: 48, fontFamily: "'DM Mono', monospace", fontSize: 11, color: "#555", lineHeight: 2 }}>
        <div style={{ color: "#ff4500" }}>◉ SYSTEM ONLINE</div>
        <div>RPM <span style={{ color: "#ff4500" }}>{rpm.toLocaleString()}</span></div>
        <div>SPD <span style={{ color: "#76ff03" }}>{speed} km/h</span></div>
        <div>TEMP <span style={{ color: "#00e5ff" }}>{temp}°C</span></div>
      </div>

      <div style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 80, position: "relative", width: "100%" }}>
        {/* Photo */}
        <div style={{ flexShrink: 0, position: "relative" }}>
          <div style={{
            width: 280, height: 340,
            position: "relative",
            animation: "fadeUp 1s 0.5s both",
          }}>
            {/* Orange frame offset */}
            <div style={{ position: "absolute", top: 12, left: 12, width: "100%", height: "100%", border: "2px solid #ff4500", zIndex: 0 }} />
            <img
              src={PHOTO_B64}
              alt="Amit Panda"
              style={{
                width: "100%", height: "100%",
                objectFit: "cover", objectPosition: "center top",
                position: "relative", zIndex: 1,
                filter: "grayscale(20%) contrast(1.05)",
              }}
            />
            {/* Bottom label */}
            <div style={{
              position: "absolute", bottom: -1, left: 0, right: 0, zIndex: 2,
              background: "#ff4500",
              fontFamily: "'DM Mono', monospace",
              fontSize: 10, letterSpacing: "0.15em",
              color: "#000", padding: "6px 14px",
              textTransform: "uppercase",
            }}>
              Amit Panda · Engineer
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Text content */}
        <div style={{ flex: 1 }}>
        <h1 style={{ fontFamily: "'Bebas Neue', sans-serif", fontSize: "clamp(72px, 12vw, 160px)", lineHeight: 0.88, letterSpacing: "0.03em", margin: "0 0 32px", animation: "slideUp 1s 0.4s both" }}>
          <span style={{ display: "block", color: "#fff" }}>AMIT</span>
          <span style={{ display: "block", color: "transparent", WebkitTextStroke: "2px #ff4500" }}>PANDA</span>

        </h1>

        <p style={{ fontFamily: "'DM Mono', monospace", fontSize: 13, color: "#777", lineHeight: 1.9, maxWidth: 520, marginBottom: 48, animation: "fadeUp 0.8s 0.8s both" }}>
          {DATA.objective}
        </p>

        <div style={{ display: "flex", gap: 20, flexWrap: "wrap", animation: "fadeUp 0.8s 1s both" }}>
          <a href={`tel:${DATA.phone}`} style={btnStyle("#ff4500")}>
            📞 {DATA.phone}
          </a>
          <a href={`mailto:${DATA.email}`} style={btnStyle("transparent", "#ff4500")}>
            ✉ {DATA.email}
          </a>
          <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/amit-panda-26a028268/" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer" style={btnStyle("transparent", "#00e5ff")}>
            🔗 LinkedIn
          </a>
        </div>

        {/* Stat row */}
        <div style={{ display: "flex", gap: 0, marginTop: 72, borderTop: "1px solid rgba(255,69,0,0.2)", paddingTop: 40, animation: "fadeUp 0.8s 1.2s both" }}>
          {[["AIR 4", "FKDC 2025"], ["AIR 9", "GKDC 2026"], ["2×", "1st Prize Winner"], ["4+", "IoT Projects"]].map(([num, label]) => (
            <div key={label} style={{ flex: 1, borderRight: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06)", padding: "0 32px" }}>
              <div style={{ fontFamily: "'Bebas Neue', sans-serif", fontSize: 40, color: "#ff4500", lineHeight: 1 }}>{num}</div>
              <div style={{ fontFamily: "'DM Mono', monospace", fontSize: 10, color: "#555", letterSpacing: "0.12em", textTransform: "uppercase", marginTop: 6 }}>{label}</div>
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>
        </div>{/* end text content */}
      </div>{/* end two-col */}

      {/* Scroll hint */}
      <div style={{ position: "absolute", bottom: 40, left: "50%", transform: "translateX(-50%)", fontFamily: "'DM Mono', monospace", fontSize: 10, color: "#444", letterSpacing: "0.15em", textAlign: "center" }}>
        <div style={{ width: 1, height: 50, background: "linear-gradient(to bottom, transparent, #ff4500)", margin: "0 auto 12px" }} />
        SCROLL
      </div>

      <style>{`
        @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Bebas+Neue&family=DM+Mono:wght@300;400&family=Barlow:ital,wght@0,300;0,400;0,600;1,300&display=swap');
        @keyframes slideUp { from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(60px)} to{opacity:1;transform:none} }
        @keyframes fadeUp  { from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(30px)} to{opacity:1;transform:none} }
        @keyframes fadeDown{ from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(-20px)} to{opacity:1;transform:none} }
        * { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
        html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }
        body { background: #050505; color: #fff; overflow-x: hidden; }
        ::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 4px; }
        ::-webkit-scrollbar-track { background: #0a0a0a; }
        ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: #ff4500; }
      `}</style>
    </section>
  );
}

function btnStyle(bg, border) {
  return {
    fontFamily: "'DM Mono', monospace", fontSize: 11,
    letterSpacing: "0.1em", padding: "12px 24px",
    background: bg || "transparent",
    border: `1px solid ${border || bg}`,
    color: bg === "transparent" ? (border || "#ff4500") : "#000",
    textDecoration: "none",
    cursor: "pointer",
    transition: "opacity 0.2s",
    display: "inline-block",
  };
}

/* ─── PROJECTS ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
function Projects() {
  const [active, setActive] = useState(0);
  const p = DATA.projects[active];

  return (
    <section id="projects" style={{ padding: "120px 48px" }}>
      <SectionLabel num="02" label="Selected Projects" />
      <Reveal>
        <h2 style={{ fontFamily: "'Bebas Neue', sans-serif", fontSize: "clamp(48px,6vw,88px)", lineHeight: 0.9, marginBottom: 64, letterSpacing: "0.03em" }}>
          WHAT I'VE<br /><span style={{ color: "#ff4500" }}>BUILT</span>
        </h2>
      </Reveal>

      <div style={{ display: "grid", gridTemplateColumns: "1fr 1.4fr", gap: 3 }}>
        {/* Left: tab list */}
        <div>
          {DATA.projects.map((proj, i) => (
            <Reveal key={proj.name} delay={i * 0.08}>
              <button
                onClick={() => setActive(i)}
                style={{
                  width: "100%", textAlign: "left", padding: "28px 32px",
                  background: active === i ? "rgba(255,69,0,0.06)" : "rgba(255,255,255,0.02)",
                  border: "none", borderLeft: `3px solid ${active === i ? proj.color : "transparent"}`,
                  borderBottom: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.04)",
                  cursor: "pointer", transition: "all 0.3s",
                  marginBottom: 3,
                }}
                onMouseEnter={e => e.currentTarget.style.background = "rgba(255,69,0,0.04)"}
                onMouseLeave={e => e.currentTarget.style.background = active === i ? "rgba(255,69,0,0.06)" : "rgba(255,255,255,0.02)"}
              >
                <div style={{ display: "flex", justifyContent: "space-between", alignItems: "center" }}>
                  <div>
                    <div style={{ fontFamily: "'Bebas Neue', sans-serif", fontSize: 22, letterSpacing: "0.05em", color: active === i ? proj.color : "#fff" }}>
                      {proj.icon} {proj.name}
                    </div>
                    <div style={{ fontFamily: "'DM Mono', monospace", fontSize: 10, color: "#555", letterSpacing: "0.1em", marginTop: 4 }}>
                      {proj.tag}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  <div style={{ fontFamily: "'DM Mono', monospace", fontSize: 10, color: "#444" }}>{proj.period}</div>
                </div>
              </button>
            </Reveal>
          ))}
        </div>

        {/* Right: detail panel */}
        <div style={{
          background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.02)",
          border: `1px solid ${p.color}22`,
          padding: 48,
          position: "relative", overflow: "hidden",
        }}>
          <div style={{ position: "absolute", top: 0, right: 0, fontFamily: "'Bebas Neue', sans-serif", fontSize: 120, color: p.color, opacity: 0.04, lineHeight: 1, userSelect: "none", pointerEvents: "none" }}>
            {p.icon}
          </div>
          <div style={{ fontFamily: "'DM Mono', monospace", fontSize: 10, color: p.color, letterSpacing: "0.15em", marginBottom: 16 }}>
            {p.period}
          </div>
          <h3 style={{ fontFamily: "'Bebas Neue', sans-serif", fontSize: 42, letterSpacing: "0.04em", marginBottom: 8, color: "#fff" }}>
            {p.name}
          </h3>
          <div style={{ fontFamily: "'DM Mono', monospace", fontSize: 12, color: "#777", marginBottom: 36, letterSpacing: "0.05em" }}>
            {p.tag}
          </div>
          <ul style={{ listStyle: "none", display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: 16 }}>
            {p.bullets.map((b, i) => (
              <li key={i} style={{ display: "flex", gap: 16, fontFamily: "'Barlow', sans-serif", fontSize: 14, color: "#aaa", lineHeight: 1.7 }}>
                <span style={{ color: p.color, flexShrink: 0, marginTop: 2 }}>▸</span>
                {b}
              </li>
            ))}
          </ul>
        </div>
      </div>
    </section>
  );
}

/* ─── SKILLS ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
function Skills() {
  return (
    <section id="skills" style={{ padding: "120px 48px", background: "rgba(255,69,0,0.02)" }}>
      <SectionLabel num="03" label="Technical Skills" />
      <Reveal>
        <h2 style={{ fontFamily: "'Bebas Neue', sans-serif", fontSize: "clamp(48px,6vw,88px)", lineHeight: 0.9, marginBottom: 64, letterSpacing: "0.03em" }}>
          MY<br /><span style={{ color: "#ff4500" }}>ARSENAL</span>
        </h2>
      </Reveal>

      <div style={{ display: "grid", gridTemplateColumns: "repeat(auto-fill, minmax(280px, 1fr))", gap: 3 }}>
        {DATA.skills.map((sk, i) => (
          <Reveal key={sk.cat} delay={i * 0.06} direction={i % 2 === 0 ? "left" : "right"}>
            <div style={{
              background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.025)",
              border: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06)",
              padding: "28px 32px",
              transition: "border-color 0.3s, background 0.3s",
            }}
              onMouseEnter={e => { e.currentTarget.style.borderColor = "rgba(255,69,0,0.4)"; e.currentTarget.style.background = "rgba(255,69,0,0.04)"; }}
              onMouseLeave={e => { e.currentTarget.style.borderColor = "rgba(255,255,255,0.06)"; e.currentTarget.style.background = "rgba(255,255,255,0.025)"; }}
            >
              <div style={{ fontFamily: "'DM Mono', monospace", fontSize: 10, color: "#ff4500", letterSpacing: "0.15em", textTransform: "uppercase", marginBottom: 20 }}>
                {sk.cat}
              </div>
              <div style={{ display: "flex", flexWrap: "wrap", gap: 8 }}>
                {sk.items.map(item => (
                  <span key={item} style={{
                    fontFamily: "'DM Mono', monospace", fontSize: 11,
                    color: "#bbb", letterSpacing: "0.05em",
                    border: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1)",
                    padding: "5px 12px",
                    transition: "all 0.2s",
                  }}
                    onMouseEnter={e => { e.target.style.borderColor = "#ff4500"; e.target.style.color = "#ff4500"; }}
                    onMouseLeave={e => { e.target.style.borderColor = "rgba(255,255,255,0.1)"; e.target.style.color = "#bbb"; }}
                  >
                    {item}
                  </span>
                ))}
              </div>
            </div>
          </Reveal>
        ))}
      </div>

      {/* Coursework */}
      <Reveal delay={0.3}>
        <div style={{ marginTop: 60 }}>
          <div style={{ fontFamily: "'DM Mono', monospace", fontSize: 10, color: "#555", letterSpacing: "0.15em", textTransform: "uppercase", marginBottom: 20 }}>
            Relevant Coursework
          </div>
          <div style={{ display: "flex", flexWrap: "wrap", gap: 12 }}>
            {DATA.coursework.map(c => (
              <span key={c} style={{ fontFamily: "'Barlow', sans-serif", fontSize: 13, color: "#666", border: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06)", padding: "8px 18px" }}>
                {c}
              </span>
            ))}
          </div>
        </div>
      </Reveal>
    </section>
  );
}

/* ─── EXPERIENCE ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
function Experience() {
  return (
    <section id="experience" style={{ padding: "120px 48px" }}>
      <SectionLabel num="04" label="Experience" />
      <Reveal>
        <h2 style={{ fontFamily: "'Bebas Neue', sans-serif", fontSize: "clamp(48px,6vw,88px)", lineHeight: 0.9, marginBottom: 64, letterSpacing: "0.03em" }}>
          RACE<br /><span style={{ color: "#ff4500" }}>TRACK</span>
        </h2>
      </Reveal>

      <div style={{ display: "grid", gridTemplateColumns: "1fr 1fr", gap: 3 }}>
        {DATA.experience.map((exp, i) => (
          <Reveal key={exp.role} delay={i * 0.15}>
            <div style={{
              background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.02)", border: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06)",
              padding: "40px", height: "100%",
              transition: "border-color 0.3s",
            }}
              onMouseEnter={e => e.currentTarget.style.borderColor = "rgba(255,69,0,0.4)"}
              onMouseLeave={e => e.currentTarget.style.borderColor = "rgba(255,255,255,0.06)"}
            >
              <div style={{ fontFamily: "'DM Mono', monospace", fontSize: 10, color: "#ff4500", letterSpacing: "0.15em", marginBottom: 12 }}>
                {exp.period}
              </div>
              <h3 style={{ fontFamily: "'Bebas Neue', sans-serif", fontSize: 30, letterSpacing: "0.04em", color: "#fff", marginBottom: 4 }}>
                {exp.role}
              </h3>
              <div style={{ fontFamily: "'DM Mono', monospace", fontSize: 11, color: "#666", marginBottom: 28 }}>
                {exp.org} · {exp.location}
              </div>
              <ul style={{ listStyle: "none", display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: 12 }}>
                {exp.bullets.map((b, j) => (
                  <li key={j} style={{ display: "flex", gap: 12, fontFamily: "'Barlow', sans-serif", fontSize: 13, color: "#888", lineHeight: 1.7 }}>
                    <span style={{ color: "#ff4500", flexShrink: 0 }}>—</span>
                    {b}
                  </li>
                ))}
              </ul>
            </div>
          </Reveal>
        ))}
      </div>

      {/* Education timeline */}
      <Reveal delay={0.3}>
        <div style={{ marginTop: 80 }}>
          <div style={{ fontFamily: "'DM Mono', monospace", fontSize: 10, color: "#555", letterSpacing: "0.15em", textTransform: "uppercase", marginBottom: 32 }}>
            Education
          </div>
          <div style={{ display: "grid", gridTemplateColumns: "repeat(3, 1fr)", gap: 3 }}>
            {DATA.education.map((e, i) => (
              <div key={i} style={{
                background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.02)", border: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06)",
                padding: "28px 32px",
                borderTop: `2px solid ${["#ff4500", "#76ff03", "#00e5ff"][i]}`,
              }}>
                <div style={{ fontFamily: "'DM Mono', monospace", fontSize: 10, color: "#555", marginBottom: 12 }}>{e.year}</div>
                <div style={{ fontFamily: "'Barlow', sans-serif", fontSize: 14, fontWeight: 600, color: "#ddd", lineHeight: 1.4, marginBottom: 8 }}>{e.degree}</div>
                <div style={{ fontFamily: "'Barlow', sans-serif", fontSize: 12, color: "#666", marginBottom: 8 }}>{e.institution}</div>
                <div style={{ fontFamily: "'DM Mono', monospace", fontSize: 11, color: ["#ff4500", "#76ff03", "#00e5ff"][i] }}>{e.score}</div>
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>
        </div>
      </Reveal>
    </section>
  );
}

/* ─── ACHIEVEMENTS ───────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
function Achievements() {
  return (
    <section id="achievements" style={{ padding: "120px 48px", background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.01)" }}>
      <SectionLabel num="05" label="Achievements" />
      <Reveal>
        <h2 style={{ fontFamily: "'Bebas Neue', sans-serif", fontSize: "clamp(48px,6vw,88px)", lineHeight: 0.9, marginBottom: 64, letterSpacing: "0.03em" }}>
          PODIUM<br /><span style={{ color: "#ff4500" }}>FINISHES</span>
        </h2>
      </Reveal>

      <div style={{ display: "grid", gridTemplateColumns: "repeat(auto-fill, minmax(340px,1fr))", gap: 3 }}>
        {DATA.achievements.map((a, i) => (
          <Reveal key={a.event} delay={i * 0.1}>
            <div style={{
              background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.025)",
              border: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06)",
              padding: "36px 40px",
              display: "flex", gap: 24, alignItems: "flex-start",
              transition: "all 0.3s",
            }}
              onMouseEnter={e => { e.currentTarget.style.background = "rgba(255,69,0,0.05)"; e.currentTarget.style.borderColor = "rgba(255,69,0,0.3)"; }}
              onMouseLeave={e => { e.currentTarget.style.background = "rgba(255,255,255,0.025)"; e.currentTarget.style.borderColor = "rgba(255,255,255,0.06)"; }}
            >
              <div style={{ fontSize: 32, flexShrink: 0 }}>{a.icon}</div>
              <div>
                <div style={{ fontFamily: "'Bebas Neue', sans-serif", fontSize: 28, color: "#ff4500", letterSpacing: "0.05em", lineHeight: 1 }}>
                  {a.rank}
                </div>
                <div style={{ fontFamily: "'DM Mono', monospace", fontSize: 11, color: "#fff", letterSpacing: "0.08em", marginTop: 6, marginBottom: 8 }}>
                  {a.event}
                </div>
                <div style={{ fontFamily: "'Barlow', sans-serif", fontSize: 13, color: "#666", lineHeight: 1.6 }}>
                  {a.desc}
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </Reveal>
        ))}
      </div>
    </section>
  );
}

/* ─── FOOTER ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
function Footer() {
  return (
    <footer style={{
      borderTop: "1px solid rgba(255,69,0,0.2)",
      padding: "60px 48px",
      display: "flex", justifyContent: "space-between", alignItems: "center",
      flexWrap: "wrap", gap: 32,
    }}>
      <div>
        <div style={{ fontFamily: "'Bebas Neue', sans-serif", fontSize: 48, letterSpacing: "0.05em", color: "#fff", lineHeight: 1 }}>
          LET'S BUILD<br /><span style={{ color: "#ff4500" }}>SOMETHING.</span>
        </div>
        <div style={{ fontFamily: "'DM Mono', monospace", fontSize: 11, color: "#555", marginTop: 16 }}>
          Available for full-time roles · Embedded Systems · IoT · Motorsports · We
        </div>
      </div>
      <div style={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: 16 }}>
        {[
          { label: "Email", value: DATA.email, href: `mailto:${DATA.email}` },
          { label: "Phone", value: DATA.phone, href: `tel:${DATA.phone}` },
          { label: "LinkedIn", value: DATA.linkedin, href: "https://www.linkedin.com/in/amit-panda-26a028268/" },
        ].map(({ label, value, href }) => (
          <a key={label} href={href} target="_blank" rel="noreferrer" style={{
            display: "flex", gap: 16, alignItems: "baseline",
            fontFamily: "'DM Mono', monospace", fontSize: 11, textDecoration: "none",
          }}>
            <span style={{ color: "#444", letterSpacing: "0.12em", width: 64 }}>{label}</span>
            <span style={{ color: "#888", transition: "color 0.2s" }}
              onMouseEnter={e => e.target.style.color = "#ff4500"}
              onMouseLeave={e => e.target.style.color = "#888"}
            >{value}</span>
          </a>
        ))}
      </div>
      <div style={{ width: "100%", borderTop: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.04)", paddingTop: 32, display: "flex", justifyContent: "space-between", fontFamily: "'DM Mono', monospace", fontSize: 10, color: "#333" }}>
        <span>© 2026 Amit Panda. All rights reserved.</span>
        <span>Palghar · Maharashtra · India</span>
      </div>
    </footer>
  );
}

/* ─── ROOT ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
export default function App() {
  return (
    <div style={{ background: "#050505", color: "#fff", minHeight: "100vh" }}>
      <Nav />
      <Hero />
      <Projects />
      <Skills />
      <Experience />
      <Achievements />
      <Footer />
    </div>
  );
}
